title: Business Valuation & Financial Advisory
shortDescription: Independent business valuation services for statutory, regulatory, transactional, and tax compliance purposes under ICAI Valuation Standards.
fullDescription: Business valuation requires rigorous technical methodology, financial modeling, and deep understanding of regulatory standards under the Income Tax Act, Companies Act, FEMA, and ICAI Valuation Standards. S.G. & Associates delivers independent business and asset valuation reports. We evaluate corporate equity, convertible instruments, intellectual property, and business units for capital raises, M&A transactions, internal restructuring, and statutory compliance filings.
scopeOfWork: Equity valuation using Discounted Cash Flow (DCF), Comparable Companies Multiple (CCM), and Net Asset Value (NAV) methods
Valuation under Section 56(2)(viib) (Rule 11UA) of the Income Tax Act for share issuance
FEMA valuation for cross-border transfer or allotment of shares involving non-residents
Companies Act, 2013 regulatory valuation for preferential allotments and rights issues (Section 62)
Valuation of Convertible Instruments (CCPS, CCDs) and hybrid financial structures
Impairment testing of assets and goodwill under Accounting Standard 28 / Ind AS 36
Intangible asset and brand valuation for business transfers and slump sales (Section 50B)
Financial due diligence and valuation review for mergers, acquisitions, and joint ventures

process.title: Engagement Scope & Data Collection
process.description: Understanding valuation purpose, collecting audited financials, historical trends, and management projections.

process.title: Methodology Selection & Analysis
process.description: Selecting internationally accepted valuation approaches (Income, Market, Cost) per ICAI Standards.

process.title: Financial Modeling & Sensitivity Analysis
process.description: Building valuation models, determining WACC, terminal growth rates, and sensitivity bounds.

process.title: Valuation Report Issuance
process.description: Drafting and issuing formal valuation report complete with disclosures, assumptions, and certification.

deliverables.title: Independent Valuation Report
deliverables.description: Comprehensive valuation document detailing methodology, parameters, financial schedules, and conclusions.

deliverables.title: Rule 11UA Valuation Certificate
deliverables.description: Statutory certificate for Income Tax compliance regarding fair market value (FMV) of unquoted equity shares.

deliverables.title: FEMA International Valuation Certificate
deliverables.description: Regulatory report compliant with RBI pricing guidelines for inbound or outbound equity investments.

deliverables.title: DCF Financial Model File
deliverables.description: Detailed Excel model including revenue drivers, margin calculations, working capital adjustments, and WACC.

faqs.question: Which valuation method is mandatory under Rule 11UA for Section 56(2)(viib)?
faqs.answer: Under Rule 11UA of the Income Tax Rules, the Fair Market Value of unquoted equity shares can be determined using either the Book Value method (NAV) or the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) method, certified by a Practicing Chartered Accountant or Registered Valuer.

faqs.question: What pricing guidelines apply to share transfers under FEMA?
faqs.answer: Under FEMA rules, transfer of shares from a resident to a non-resident cannot be below the fair market value determined per an internationally accepted pricing methodology on an arm's length basis, certified by a Practicing CA or SEBI Registered Merchant Banker.

faqs.question: What valuation standards does S.G. & Associates follow?
faqs.answer: Our valuation engagements adhere to the ICAI Valuation Standards (IVS 101, 102, 103, 201, 202, 301) issued by the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India.

keyHighlights: Adherence to ICAI Valuation Standards (IVS) framework
Filing-ready reports for Income Tax, RBI/FEMA, and MCA requirements
Rigorously validated financial modeling and sensitivity testing
